description: Style NoteRushing out of the house for a quick errand or that walk on the beach would be indeed difficult without these flip flops from gliders. Add style to your casual and throw on outfits with these slip ons while making sure that your feet are comfortable.Product DetailsFlip flops with thong styled straps and a toe separatorSoft and curved red removable foot bed with branding on the heel, nubs mimicking the shape of the foot and a green footbed that can replace the red footbed for variety and styleThick TPU outsole with circular lugs and patterned grooves Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
